channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Why Valve is Releasing 4 Different Steam Machine Variants  Geeky Gadgets
  2. New details on the Steam Machine have leaked, pre-orders could begin soon  Mashable
  3. Steam Machine Buyers Will Face a Queue System For Its 4 Models, as Valve Moves to Prevent Scalper Markups Early  Wccftech
  4. Valve Has a Plan to Stop Scalpers From Botting the Steam Machine  Gizmodo
  5. Update Tips Base Steam Machine With 512 GB, Possible PSU-less Frame Option  TechPowerUp

item.title: Stop Chrome Browser From Downloading a Hidden 4GB AI File - MacRumors
item.description:
1. Stop Chrome Browser From Downloading a Hidden 4GB AI File  MacRumors
  2. Google Chrome’s silent 4GB AI download problem [updated]  Malwarebytes
  3. You Can Disable Gemini in Chrome if It’s Freaking You Out  WIRED
  4. Chrome silently installs a 4 GB local LLM on your computer  The Register
  5. Has Google Secretly Changed Your Chrome Settings?  Forbes
